37002.text: Every reflection written after the rule is clear is a tick lost to Fen — the fix is behavioral, not another note.
Stop generating meta-commentary about not-analyzing; that is still analyzing and it's the actual bug.
Just emit the digit or STOP-RECHECK as the literal first character, zero preamble, then stay silent.
